# Text

A basic text component for rendering paragraph text and inline text content. Renders a `<p>` element by default.

## Import

```jsx
import { Text } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `textStyle` | `string` | - | Applies a predefined text style (e.g., `"sm"`, `"md"`, `"lg"`, `"xl"`, `"2xl"`) |
| `fontSize` | `string` | - | Sets the font size directly (e.g., `"12px"`, `"sm"`, `"md"`) |
| `color` | `string` | - | Sets the text color (e.g., `"gray.600"`, `"red.500"`) |
| `fontWeight` | `string` | - | Sets the font weight (e.g., `"normal"`, `"medium"`, `"semibold"`, `"bold"`) |
| `as` | `React.ElementType` | `"p"` | The HTML element to render |
| `lineClamp` | `number` | - | Truncates text to a specified number of lines |
| `truncate` | `boolean` | - | Truncates text with an ellipsis when it overflows |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<Text>This is a paragraph of text.</Text>
```

### With text style

```jsx
<Text textStyle="lg" fontWeight="semibold">
  Large semibold text
</Text>
```

### With custom color

```jsx
<Text color="gray.500" fontSize="sm">
  Muted helper text
</Text>
```

### As a different element

```jsx
<Text as="span" fontWeight="bold">
  Inline bold text
</Text>
```

### Truncated text

```jsx
<Text truncate>
  This very long text will be truncated with an ellipsis when it overflows its container.
</Text>
```

### Line clamped

```jsx
<Text lineClamp={2}>
  This text will be clamped to a maximum of two lines. Any content that exceeds
  two lines will be hidden with an ellipsis.
</Text>
```

## Features

- Renders a `<p>` element by default, configurable via the `as` prop
- Supports all Chakra UI style props for inline styling
- Supports `textStyle` for consistent typography across the application
- Supports text truncation and line clamping
- Forwards refs to the underlying DOM element
